hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'gh pr (create|ready)' || exit 0; gate="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.keiko-scripts/audit-gate.sh"; [ -x "$gate" ] || exit 0; "$gate" >&2 || exit 2; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'gh pr (create|ready)' || exit 0; gate="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.keiko-scripts/verify-gate.sh"; [ -x "$gate" ] || exit 0; "$gate" >&2 || exit 2; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(>>?|tee)[^|;&]*agent-memory' && { echo '[memory-path] BLOCKED: write agent memory to .agents/memory/<role>/, not the legacy .claude/agent-memory/.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'gh pr merge' || exit 0; gate="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.keiko-scripts/epic-merge-gate.sh"; [ -x "$gate" ] || exit 0; "$gate" "$cmd" >&2 || exit 2; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'gh pr ready' || exit 0; gate="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.keiko-scripts/ready-gate.sh"; [ -x "$gate" ] || exit 0; "$gate" "$cmd" >&2 || exit 2; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git +push' || exit 0; gate="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.keiko-scripts/push-gate.sh"; [ -x "$gate" ] || exit 0; "$gate" >&2 || exit 2; exit 0
